passive.name: Fury of the North
passive.description: After being out of combat, Sejuani gains Frost Armor which grants Armor and Magic Resist and immunity to slows. Frost Armor persists for a short time after Sejuani takes damage.  Sejuani can damage a stunned enemy to shatter it, dealing massive magic damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate - Icebreaker:}} Enemies {{tip|stun|stunned}} by {{ci|Sejuani}} are also marked ''Frozen'' at the same time. Her next basic attack against a ''Frozen'' target will consume the mark to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} based on {{as|their '''maximum''' health}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Frost Armor:}} '''Sejuani''' gains ''Frost Armor'', which lingers shortly after taking damage from enemy {{tip|champions}} or large {{tip|monsters}}. She restores it after a period without taking damage from them.
wiki_detail.blurb4: [[File:Sejuani Frost Armor.png|20px|link=]]{{sbc|Frost Armor:}} Sejuani gains {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}} and {{sti|mr|{{as|'''bonus''' magic resist}}}}, as well as {{tip|slow-immune|slow immunity}} and {{tip|cripple-immune|cripple immunity}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Icebreaker:}} Enemies {{tip|stun|stunned}} by '''Sejuani''' are marked ''Frozen'' for the disable's duration. '''Sejuani's''' next [[basic attack]] or [[champion ability|ability]] against a ''Frozen'' enemy will consume the mark to deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} equal to {{as|10% of their '''maximum''' health}}, capped at 250 against epic monsters.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - Frost Armor:}} '''Sejuani''' gains ''Frost Armor'', which lingers for 3 seconds after taking damage from enemy {{tip|champions}}, {{tip|turrets}}, or large {{tip|monsters}}. She restores it after {{pp|12 to 6}} seconds without taking damage from them.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Frost Armor:}} '''Sejuani''' gains {{tip|slow-immune|slow immunity}}, {{tip|cripple-immune|cripple immunity}}, {{sti|armor|{{as|10 (+ 75% '''bonus''' armor) '''bonus''' armor}}}}, and {{sti|mr|{{as|10 (+ 75% '''bonus''' magic resistance) '''bonus''' magic resistance}}}}.
wiki_detail.knockdown:
|notes        = 
* Gaining ''Frost Armor'' does not remove any pre-existing {{tip|slow|slows}} or {{tip|cripple|cripples}}.
* ''Icebreaker'' will not trigger if the basic attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Icebreaker's '' interactions with {{tip|dodge|dodging}} and {{tip|blind|blinding}} effects via basic attack.
* {{Pending for test}}: {{tip|Spell shield}} interaction with ''Icebreaker''.

Q.name: Arctic Assault
Q.description: Sejuani charges forward, knocking enemies into the air. The charge stops after hitting an enemy champion.
Q.tooltip: Sejuani charges, dealing {{ totaldamagetooltip }} magic damage to enemies and Knocking them Up for {{ e4 }} seconds. The charge ends after hitting an enemy champion.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sejuani}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target location, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|airborne|knocking up}} enemies she passes through. She will stop upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''{{ui|Bristle|nolink=true}}''' {{tip|dash|dashes}} to the target location until he collides with an enemy {{tip|champion}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies he passes through and {{tip|airborne|knocking them up}} for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Arctic Assault can be cast during her other abilities without cancelling them and vice versa. Arctic Assault will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Champions will slightly be {{tip|airborne|knocked back}}, while [[minion]]s and [[monster]]s will instead be slightly {{tip|airborne|pulled}} for a fixed distance.
* ''Arctic Assault'' cannot {{tip|airborne|knock}} enemies over terrain.
* Casting {{si|Flash}} during ''Arctic Assault'' will end the dash and affect enemies at the new location.
* Upon colliding with an enemy {{Tip|champion}}, Sejuani will {{Tip|basic attack|attack}} them.

W.name: Winter's Wrath
W.description: Sejuani swings her mace twice, dealing damage, slowing enemies and applying Frost stacks.
W.tooltip:
Sejuani swings her flail, dealing {{ firsthitdamagetooltip }} physical damage and Knocking Back minions and jungle monsters. She then lashes out again, dealing {{ secondhitdamagetooltip }} physical damage and briefly Slowing targets.

Both swings apply stacks of Permafrost.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sejuani}} swings her flail in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit, {{tip|airborne|knocking back}} {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: She then lashes out the flail in a line in the same direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} After {{fd|0.25}} seconds into the cast time, '''Sejuani''' swings her flail in a cone in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|airborne|knocks back}} {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}} hit.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|5 to 45}} {{as|(+ 20% AP)}} {{as|(+ 4% of her '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: After the cast time, '''Sejuani''' lashes out with her flail in a line in the same direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow|slowing}} them by 75% for {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|5 to 85}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} {{as|(+ 8% of her '''maximum''' health)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|5+5 to 45+85}} {{as|(+ 80% AP)}} {{as|(+ {{ap|8+4}}% of her '''maximum''' health)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Sejuani''' can move during Winter's Wrath's cast time.''

E.name: Permafrost
E.description: Sejuani freezes and stuns an enemy champion that has maximum Frost stacks.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Nearby melee allied champions' Attacks apply a stack to champions and jungle monsters.

Active: Sejuani deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage to target enemy with 4 stacks and Stuns them for {{ e1 }} second. {{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ai|Winter's Wrath|Sejuani}} and both {{cis|Sejuani}} and nearby allied {{tip|melee}} champions' attacks apply stacks of ''Frost'' against {{tip|champions}}, medium / large {{tip|monsters}} and large {{tip|minions}}, which lasts a few seconds and stacks up to a cap. '''Sejuani''' can cast ''Permafrost'' against an enemy with max stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sejuani''' hurls a trap at the target enemy that consumes their ''Frost'' stacks and {{tip|knockdown|knocks them down}}, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|stun|stunning}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Once an enemy's ''Frost'' stacks are consumed, they cannot gain any more for a period.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Passive:}} {{ai|Winter's Wrath|Sejuani}} and both '''Sejuani's''' and nearby allied {{tip|melee}} champions' attacks {{tip|on-hit}} apply [[stack]]s of ''Frost'' to enemy {{tip|champions}}, medium or large {{tip|monsters}}, and large {{tip|minions}} for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 4 times, though not applying if the target is ''{{ai|Fury of the North|Sejuani|Frozen}}''. Enemies hit by ''Permafrost'' or ''{{ais|Glacial Prison|Sejuani}}'' bola have all of their ''Frost'' stacks consumed. Enemy champions cannot be affected by ''Frost'' for 8 seconds after having it consumed.

'''Sejuani''' can cast ''Permafrost'' against an enemy with 4 stacks.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sejuani''' hurls a trap at the {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy with 4 stacks of ''Frost'' closest to the cursor, which deals {{as|magic damage}}, {{tt|displaces|Only move block, does not stun the target's actions (disables attacking and movement only)}} them slightly, and {{tip|stun|stuns}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Permafrost's'' targeting prioritizes champions within 50 of cursor, then non-champions within 50 of cursor, then champions within 350 of cursor, then closest unit to cursor within 2500 (this only applies if there is no target directly under the cursor).
* ''Frost'' stacks will not be applied if the basic attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
* {{Pending for test}}: ''Permafrost's'' stack application interaction with ''parrying'' effects ({{ai|Counter Strike|Jax|dodge}}, {{tip|blind}}).
* If the target becomes {{tip|untargetable}}, {{tip|death|dies}}, or is too far away or no longer in {{tip|sight}} during the cast time, this ability will cancel but still go on {{sti|cooldown}} and pay its cost.{{bug}}

R.name: Glacial Prison
R.description: Sejuani throws her bola that freezes and stuns the first champion hit and creates an ice storm that slows other enemies.
R.tooltip:
Sejuani throws her True Ice bola, Stunning and revealing the first enemy champion hit for {{ e2 }} second and dealing {{ minordamagetooltip }} magic damage.

If the bola travels at least 25% of its range, it Stuns and reveals for {{ e6 }} seconds instead. It then also creates an ice storm that Slows surrounding enemies by {{ e4 }}% for {{ e3 }} seconds. All affected enemies take {{ totaldamagetooltip }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Sejuani}} throws an ice bola in the target direction that stops upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|stun|stunning}} them.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the bola travels far enough, it becomes empowered to detonate upon reaching max range or hitting an enemy champion, gaining increased damage and stun duration. It also creates a frost storm that {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb3: After a brief moment, the storm shatters to deal {{as|magic damage}} and briefly {{tip|slow}} enemies within.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Sejuani''' throws an ice bola in the target direction that stops upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description2: If the bola travels over 400 units, it becomes empowered to detonate upon reaching maximum range or hitting an enemy champion, dealing increased damage and {{tip|stun|stunning}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds instead. For the same duration, a frost storm is created around the location of the detonation that {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies within by 30% and grants {{tip|sight}} of the area in a smaller radius.
wiki_detail.description3: Afterwards, the storm shatters to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|slow}} them by 80% for 1 second, as well as {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: The enemy hit by the bola is not affected by the storm's effects.
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} to the primary target and {{tip|area damage}} to secondary targets in the ice storm.
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will block only a single instance of damage.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
* Both areas of effect will be centered on the first champion struck, not at the location the missile collided with them.
wiki_detail.tips: * {{ai|Q|Sejuani}} can be used after casting ''Glacial Prison'' to hide the cast animation.
